name: Stuffed Bass with Creole Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 4 Largemouth bass fillets (1.5-2 pounds each).
2. Finely mince onion.
3. Melt butter or margarine in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Combine bread slices, milk, thyme, salt, black pepper, beaten egg, flour, and beaten egg yolk to create the stuffing mixture.
5. Coat the prepared bread crumbs with vegetable oil for frying.
6. Prepare Creole sauce according to your preferred recipe or instructions.
7. Stuff each bass fillet with the prepared stuffing mixture.
8. Fry the stuffed bass in hot oil until golden brown on all sides (do not overcook).
